title: Getlink warns unstable EU software could delay Channel Tunnel biometric borders
summary: Yann Leriche, chief executive of Getlink, has a blunt diagnosis for why Europe’s new biometric border regime is still not running end to end at the Channel Tunnel. At the Channel Tunnel, though, one piece is still missing.
